certified_capabilities: Verifies invocation request, authorization, packet, candidate, handoff, chain, replay, authority, and hash continuity.
Selects exactly one compatible Worker from bounded Worker registry evidence.
Validates Worker family, Worker role, execution packet, allowed outputs, and forbidden operations.
Persists assignment evidence, classification, artifact, and result.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_assignment_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_gap_before_first_dispatch: A governed dispatch runtime must consume WORKER_ASSIGNMENT_ARTIFACT_V1.

Dispatch must validate assignment lineage, invocation request lineage, authorization lineage, Worker identity continuity, execution packet continuity, allowed outputs, forbidden operations, replay continuity, and authority continuity.
Worker invocation, execution, result validation, post-execution replay review, and termination remain separate downstream certifications.
